message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Account {
  userdatall
  admindatall
}

class User {
  name
  password
  IDcard
  --
  getprice()
  getdate()
  getnumber()
  getplace()
  bookingtecket()
  changebooking()
  returnticket()
}

class Admin {
  name
  password
  --
  changeticket()
}

class TicketSystem {
  cancel()
  display()
  recordticket()
  recordorder()
  displayticket()
  displayorder()
  update()
  searchticket()
  searchorder()
}

class Order {
  username
  userId
  bookingtecket
}

class Ticket {
  price
  date
  number
  price
}

User --|> Account
Admin --|> Account

User --> TicketSystem
Admin --> TicketSystem

TicketSystem --> Order
TicketSystem --> Ticket
@enduml
